meta.ticker_top: VOL. I — BACKEND ARCHITECTURE — DISTRIBUTED SYSTEMS — RUST — GOLANG — HIGH-THROUGHPUT — ZERO-LATENCY —
meta.ticker_bottom: — THE ARCHITECTURE MUST NOT FAIL — FORM FOLLOWS FUNCTION — NO BLOAT, ONLY THROUGHPUT —

hero.body: Polyglot Systems Programmer specializing in high-throughput, memory-safe backend architectures. Building blazing-fast frameworks, distributed AI pipelines, and the unyielding foundations of the modern web.

projects.title: Blaze
projects.subtitle: 190K+ REQ/SEC GO WEB FRAMEWORK
projects.desc: Blazing-fast Go web framework with intelligent caching, WebSockets, TLS, and zero-allocation routing. Outperforms established Go libraries in TechEmpower benchmarks.

projects.title: Ignitia
projects.subtitle: 155K+ REQ/SEC RUST WEB FRAMEWORK
projects.desc: Blazing-fast Rust framework with radix routing, zero-copy optimization, DashMap concurrency, WebSocket integration, and multipart parsing.

projects.title: Pingora WAF
projects.subtitle: HIGH-PERFORMANCE WEB APPLICATION FIREWALL
projects.desc: WAF built on Cloudflare's Pingora. Blocks SQLi, XSS, and path traversal at 15K+ req/sec with <7ms latency. 3× faster than ModSecurity. Prometheus metrics built-in.

projects.title: Vani AI
projects.subtitle: MULTILINGUAL AI VOICE ASSISTANT WITH VISION
projects.desc: Local-first multilingual AI assistant integrating Faster-Whisper STT, Meta Llama for NLP, and Moondream vision model for real-time image evaluation.

projects.title: Multi-Cam
projects.subtitle: REAL-TIME MULTI-CAMERA FACE TRACKER
projects.desc: Computer vision engine tracking 4+ webcams/RTSP streams at 30 FPS. InsightFace for age/gender demographics. Automated Telegram webhook alerts for unknown entities.

projects.title: Typewriter
projects.subtitle: TERMINAL TYPEWRITER EMULATOR IN RUST
projects.desc: A terminal typewriter experience — mechanical click sounds, keystroke animations, and distraction-free writing mode. Built entirely in Rust.

experience.desc: Producing Rust, Go, and AI tutorials reaching 2,991 subscribers and 5,000+ monthly Medium readers. Leading a 500+ member developer Discord with architectural reviews and system design mentorship.
Optimized microservice architectures cutting API latency by 40%. Integrated 5+ async REST APIs across Java/Node.js. Engineered a Bio Link platform supporting 1,000+ active users within 3 months.
Built production-grade open-source frameworks: Blaze (190K RPS), Ignitia (155K RPS), Pingora WAF, Mini-Blockchain, Mini-Kafka, WsForge, and 20+ more systems-level projects.
